calendar.matters:
Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-27-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Stephen Choo of Ropers, Majeski, Kohn & Bentley telephone number 415-543-4800 for Plaintiff Asterisk, Inc.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PETITIONER ASTERISK, INC'S Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. Order and a separate judgment signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/HK)
